final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 16'b0;
        end else begin
            data_out <= {data_in, data_in}; // Repeat input data
        end
    end
endmodule
